classFeatures.name: Damned
classFeatures.description: When a diabolist is killed, her soul is instantly sent to Hell. Any character attempting to resurrect her must succeed at a caster level check equal to 10 + the diabolist's level or her spell fails. That character cannot attempt to resurrect the diabolist again until the following day, though other characters can attempt as they please.

classFeatures.name: Imp Companion
classFeatures.description: A diabolist forms a close bond with a particular imp, similar to a druid's bond with an animal companion. The imp is loyal to the diabolist (though ultimately loyal to Hell). The imp companion's abilities, feats, Hit Dice , and skills advance as the diabolist advances in level (see sidebar). If the imp is slain or the diabolist release it from her service, she may gain a new one by performing a ceremony requiring a 24-hour ritual to conjure and bind the new imp to herself.

classFeatures.name: Channel Hellfire
classFeatures.description: At 2nd level, a diabolist can alter spells that deal energy damage to instead deal hellfire damage. She can do this as a free action a number of times per day equal to her Charisma modifier (minimum 1). Spells altered to use hellfire gain the lawful and evil descriptors .

classFeatures.name: Infernal Bargain
classFeatures.description: At 2nd level, a diabolist making use of planar ally (or a similar spell) can make an opposed Charisma check against a called (but not summoned) devil. If she succeeds, the devil reduces the price it demands to serve by half.

classFeatures.name: Augment Summoning
classFeatures.description: At 3rd level, a diabolist gains the Augment Summoning feat even if she does not meet the prerequisites.

classFeatures.name: Hellish Soul
classFeatures.description: At 5th level, a diabolist has been deemed useful enough to the cause of Hell to be allowed a brief respite from damnation. If killed by any means outside of the will of Asmodeus, the archdevils, or another influential force in Hell, the diabolist can be resurrected as normal.

classFeatures.name: Infernal Transport
classFeatures.description: At 6th level, a diabolist can transport herself through Hell in a burst of brimstone. She may use this ability twice per day as per dimension door , or expend both uses to travel as if using teleport . She cannot use this ability to enter or leave areas warded against evil creatures.

classFeatures.name: Hellfire Ray
classFeatures.description: At 8th level, a diabolist may use hellfire ray twice per day.

classFeatures.name: Master Conjurer
classFeatures.description: At 10th level, when a diabolist calls a devil whose name she knows, she may cast the calling spell as a standard action and bargain with it as a move action. She adds half her Bluff , Diplomacy , or Intimidate modifier on the bargaining Charisma check (if any).
